hero.title: ADUSA Ping Pong Madness 2026
hero.subtitle: Know the game. Win the game.

rules.title: Match Format
rules.content: It's on you to make it happen! Coordinate with your opponent and get it done.
items: Each round has a tentative weekly deadline — don't sleep on it!
No-shows after organizer reminders = automatic elimination 🚫

rules.title: Game Rules
items: Must win by 2 points — Deuce rules apply 🔥

rules.title: Equipment & Setup
items: Bring your own gear if you want that edge 🎯
Players set up and reset the table

rules.title: Reporting Results
rules.content:
Once the battle is over — 📧 send a quick note to Viramya with the result.
Winner, loser, scores. Don't leave us guessing! 🏃

footer: Good luck, have fun, and may your serves be unreturn-able. 🏓💨
